sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98015" key="sugxristo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συγ-χριστός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n98015.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be applied as ointment</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λιπάσματα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.18</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
